testcase.name: test_get_enquiries_returns_200
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_iter15_enquiries.py:31: in admin_token assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Admin login failed: {resp.status_code} {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Admin login failed: 403 {"detail":"This code is reserved for platform administration. Please use the Platform Admin login portal."} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_request_quote_endpoint_returns_404

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 404 (endpoint removed), but got 405. The old /products/request-quote endpoint should have been removed! assert 405 == 404 + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter15_enquiries.py:265: in test_request_quote_endpoint_returns_404 assert resp.status_code == 404, ( E AssertionError: Expected 404 (endpoint removed), but got 405. The old /products/request-quote endpoint should have been removed! E assert 405 == 404 E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code
